summary: Comprehensive testing of صوت الكورة (Koora Voice) app - All major features tested including Watch Party, Stream, Reactions, Polls, Room Chat, and Room UI. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: Room page loads correctly with all UI components.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection fails initially but HTTP fallback works correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working correctly. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend room page loads with all components: header, speakers grid (12 seats), chat section, control bar, polls. WebSocket has HTTP fallback. Agora SDK integration working for audio/video.

watch_party.details: 4 channels configured, API returns active watch party

stream.details: 4 slots configured, stream active with YouTube embed

reactions.details: Send and receive reactions via API (uses 'reaction' field)

room_chat.details: Messages sent and received, chat input visible

room_ui.details: Header with title/members, speakers grid (12 seats), control bar with stage button

login_flow.details: Login with identifier field works correctly

room_join_leave.details: Join and leave room APIs working

polls.details: Active poll displayed in room, create poll API working

ui_components_verified: Control bar with 'صعود للمنصة' (Join stage) button
